seoTitle: Melton vs Melton Station — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Melton and Melton Station. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Melton vs Melton Station: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Melton and Melton Station.
heading: Melton vs Melton Station — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Melton, South Australia and Melton Station, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Melton Station has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Melton (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Melton or Melton Station safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Melton has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Melton Station scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Melton scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Melton Station scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Melton or Melton Station?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Melton Station has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.32% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
